sql_array: CREATE TABLE temperature_data (value Float64, timestamp DateTime) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT exponentialMovingAverage(1)(value, intDiv(toUInt32(timestamp), 3600)) AS exp_average FROM temperature_data;
UPDATE temperature_data SET value = value * 1.1 WHERE timestamp = '2023-10-01 01:00:00';
SELECT timestamp, value, exponentialMovingAverage(3)(value, intDiv(toUInt32(timestamp), 3600)) AS exp_average FROM temperature_data ORDER BY timestamp;
